_comment: factions.json: This table is used for all of the factions in the game.

factions.name: Wardens of the Sacred Flame
factions.description: Noble knights protecting Aldenexia, tied to the Sword of Light.

factions.name: Twilight Accord
factions.description: Secretive rogues seeking the Void’s power.

factions.name: Luminar Covenant
factions.description: Devout followers of Aurethiel, upholding justice and light.

factions.name: Circle of Thorns
factions.description: Elven mystics attuned to nature and balance, guided by Thalorun.

factions.name: Verdant Kin
factions.description: Nature-bound protectors of Aldenexia’s forests, allied with elves and halflings.

factions.name: Hands of the Eternal Forge
factions.description: Dwarven craftsmen devoted to Durnhal, masters of creation and endurance.

factions.name: Ironclad Brotherhood
factions.description: Dwarven and half-orc warriors valuing strength and loyalty.

factions.name: Arcane Synod
factions.description: Gnomish scholars of magic, dedicated to knowledge and Sylaen.

factions.name: Arcane Dominion
factions.description: Ambitious gnomes wielding arcane power, wary of Lumora’s simplicity.

factions.name: Echoes of the Deep
factions.description: Half-elven wanderers inspired by Lirael, seeking peace and harmony.

factions.name: Umbral Talon
factions.description: Fierce warriors of ogres, trolls, and others, sworn to Kaerun’s conquest.

factions.name: Shattered Horn Tribe
factions.description: Ogre clans united by strength, honoring Kaerun’s warlike spirit.

factions.name: Stoneblood Clan
factions.description: Troll warriors bound by Morthan, embracing death and decay.

factions.name: Veilstriders
factions.description: Dark elf agents of Virexus, masters of shadows and secrets.

factions.name: Brood of Fennarach
factions.description: LizardKin devotees of Kaerun, thriving in the swamps of Shadowfen.
